_doc: Char-count baseline for each LLM-facing payload. PromptSizeProbeTest derives ceiling as chars × 1.15 in code; there is no manual ceiling here. On growth past ceiling: trim the prompt. On shrinkage below 'chars': run `bazel run //src/test:update_prompt_baselines` to rewrite this file, then commit. Each entry carries 'updatedBy' (PR or issue ref) and 'reason' for audit trail; the updater stamps 'auto' / dated 'regenerated' when an entry changes, leaving you to refine those fields before committing.

readinessPrompt.reason: Removed `dimensions` and `missingAreas` enum listings; their canonical names reach the LLM via the JSON-schema enum values. Kept the per-dimension calibration paragraph (load-bearing guidance).
